prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低位次分别约为14562、13253、12047、13407、14588名，整体呈先升后降再升的波动走势，2023年达到近年最高点（12047名）后连 续两年后移，2025年基准位次约14588名，较2023年后移约2541名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021年37人、2022年36人、2023年36人、2024年33人、2025年3 2人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划增至41人，较2025年扩招约28.1%，扩招幅度较大，有利于降低录取竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连海事大学为211工程、双一流建设高 校，软科中国大学排名近年约第110名左右（2026年排名第113名），在211高校中处于中游偏上水平，学校层次稳定；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情 或投档断档事件；抖音热度排名第50位，评价为较热，短视频平台关注度中等偏上，对报考热度有一定正向影响；第五轮学科评估中该校无A-及以上等级学科记 录，优势学科主要集中在交通运输工程、航海技术等涉海领域，学科竞争力在211高校中处于中等水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度高热推 荐，法学、电气工程等专业推荐度较高，与该校开设的计算机类、电子信息类、法学等专业方向匹配，相关专业热度对报考有正向拉动；北京市2026年高考考生总数约84900人， 较2025年65434人增加约29.7%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；大连海事大学位于辽宁省大连市，属东北地区高校，北京考 生对东北地区高校存在一定地域偏好差异，但该校作为211高校仍具吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次145 88名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招约28.1%（缓解竞争）、北京市考生总数大幅增长约29.7%（加剧竞争）、声誉平稳偏正面、专业热度较高等因素，供需弹性模型计算得出基准位次 约17050名，考虑考生大增的边际压力略超扩招缓解效应，小幅上调后预测2026年最低位次约17100名，区间16600–17600名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（辽宁）
- 计算机类（辽宁）（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术、网络工程、智能科学与技术）
- 电子信息类（辽宁）（含电子信息工程、电子信息科学与技术、通信工程、光电信息科学与工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 人工智能（辽宁）
- 交通管理（辽宁）
- 经济学类（辽宁）（含经济学、国际经济与贸易）
- 工商管理类（辽宁）（含工商管理、财务管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

- 物流管理（辽宁）
- 金融工程（辽宁）
- 法学（辽宁）（东北财经大学会计学联培项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约17100名，区间16600–17600名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如16000名以内）可重点冲刺 一档的法学、计算机类、电子信息类等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如17500名以外）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中竞争相对较小的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Beijing were approximately 14562, 13253, 12047, 13407, and 14588 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again. The highest point in recent years was reached in 2023 (12047), followed by a decline for two consecutive years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 14588, which is about 2541 positions lower than in 2023. The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Beijing was 37 students in 2021, 36 in 2022, 36 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and 32 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction year by year. In 2026, the plan increases to 41 students, an expansion of about 28.1% compared to 2025, which is a significant increase and helps reduce competition pressure for admission.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian Maritime University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its recent ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities is around 110th (113th in 2026), placing it in the upper-middle level among 211 universities, with a stable school level. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 50th, rated as relatively hot, with above-average attention on short video platforms, which has a certain positive impact on application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no records of A- or above-level disciplines, with its advantageous disciplines mainly concentrated in fields such as transportation engineering and navigation technology, placing its disciplinary competitiveness at a medium level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication engineering are highly recommended due to high social popularity, while law, electrical engineering, and other majors are also highly recommended. These align with the university's offerings in computer science, electronic information, and law, positively influencing application popularity. In 2026, the total number of Beijing Gaokao examinees is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, representing a significant growth in the examinee population and intensifying competition. Dalian Maritime University is located in Dalian, Liaoning Province, in Northeast China. Beijing examinees may have some regional preference differences towards universities in Northeast China, but as a 211 university, it still holds appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 14588 in 2025, the significant enrollment expansion of about 28.1% in 2026 (alleviating competition), the substantial increase of about 29.7% in the total number of Beijing examinees (intensifying competition), a stable and slightly positive reputation, and high major popularity, the supply-demand elasticity model calculates a baseline ranking of approximately 17050. Taking into account the marginal pressure from the large increase in examinees slightly outweighing the alleviating effect of the enrollment expansion, a slight upward adjustment leads to a predicted minimum ranking of about 17100 for 2026, with a range of 16600–17600.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Science (Liaoning) (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Network Engineering, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Electronic Information (Liaoning) (including Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Artificial Intelligence (Liaoning)
- Traffic Management (Liaoning)

- Business Administration (Liaoning) (including Business Administration, Financial Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical Engineering (Liaoning) (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Rescue and Salvage Engineering (Marine Intelligent Equipment))
- Logistics Management (Liaoning)
- Financial Engineering (Liaoning)
- Law (Liaoning) (Dongbei University of Finance and Economics Accounting Joint Training Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 17100, range 16600–17600. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 16000), you can focus on reaching for popular majors in Tier 1 such as Law, Computer Science, and Electronic Information. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 17500), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors, while also considering less competitive majors in Tier 2.
